summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Class Platform Phase 3 upgrade - Cycle-based teacher payments (INR), bulk recurring scheduling (max 1 year), dashboard notifications, DIGI TUTORIAL CLASSES branding across all pages, and student cycle visibility. All major Phase 3 features working excellently with 93.3% backend success rate and 95%+ frontend success rate.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for admin user accessing teacher endpoint
minor_issues.impact: Technically correct behavior - 403 Forbidden is appropriate for authenticated users lacking proper role

minor_issues.issue: Timeout loading payment cycles content in teacher dashboard
minor_issues.impact: Content loads but with delay, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@classplatform.com / admin123)
Login page DIGI TUTORIAL CLASSES branding with logo and footer
Admin dashboard logo in sidebar and DIGI TUTORIAL branding
Create teacher with cycle-based payment (payment_mode=cycle, cycle_size=12, cycle_amount=6000 INR)
Create teacher with per-class payment (payment_mode=per_class, hourly_rate=500 INR)
Teacher table shows payment mode (Cycle/Per Class) and INR amounts correctly
Bulk scheduling dialog - select days of week, date range with max 1 year enforcement
Bulk schedule API correctly rejects requests over 1 year (400 error)
Bulk schedule API successfully creates 39 recurring classes for 3-month period
Notification bell in admin top bar with notification panel
Admin notifications API working (GET /api/admin/notifications)
Mark all notifications read functionality working
Admin stats include unread notifications count
Schedule single class still works with Google Meet link
Teacher dashboard accessible with DIGI TUTORIAL CLASSES branding
Teacher dashboard Payment Cycles tab found and accessible
Student dashboard accessible with DIGI TUTORIAL CLASSES branding
Student dashboard shows class cycle progress circle (0% for demo student)
Student cycle visibility: 0/10 used, 10 remaining classes displayed
Student attendance percentage and hours attended displayed
All amounts shown in INR format across admin, teacher, and payment sections
Footer shows DIGI TUTORIAL CLASSES on all pages (login, admin, teacher, student)
Payment recording with cycle information (cycle_number field)
Google Meet platform option available in class scheduling
Days of week selection working in bulk scheduling (Mon, Wed, Fri tested)
Time slot field working in bulk scheduling
Meet link field appears correctly for Google Meet platform selection
